---
pagetitle: "NBIS Workshop"
subtitle: ""
toc: false
date: ""
sidebar: false
image: "assets/images/seo.webp"
format:
  html:
    css: "assets/css/home.css"
    number-sections: false
    title-block-banner: false
    page-layout: full
    anchor-sections: false
execute:
  freeze: false
---

::: {.home-container}
::: {.home-grid-parent}
::: {.home-grid-child-left}

### NBIS Workshop
## **Epigenomics Data Analysis**<br>From Bulk to Single Cell

An introduction to best practice bioinformatics methods for processing, analyses 
and integration of epigenomics data. This online workshop includes lectures, 
programming tutorials and interactive group sessions.

This webpage is still under construction. Course materials will be made 
available at the start of the workshop. Material from the previous year can be 
found [here](https://nbis-workshop-epigenomics.readthedocs.io/en/latest/).

---

::: small
Updated: {{< meta current_date >}}  at {{< meta current_time >}} .
:::

:::
:::{.home-grid-child-right}

![](assets/images/hero.webp){.nolightbox}

:::
:::
:::
